info.name: PrestaShop API - Full Collection
info.description: Collection complète PrestaShop REST API - toutes les ressources avec toutes les méthodes HTTP

body.raw:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<prestashop xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">
  <product>
    <id_category_default>2</id_category_default>
    <price>29.99</price>
    <active>1</active>
    <type>simple</type>
    <state>1</state>
    <name><language id="1">New Product</language></name>
    <description><language id="1">Product description</language></description>
    <description_short><language id="1">Short description</language></description_short>
    <link_rewrite><language id="1">new-product</language></link_rewrite>
  </product>
</prestashop>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<prestashop xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">
  <category>
    <id_parent>2</id_parent>
    <active>1</active>
    <name><language id="1">New Category</language></name>
    <description><language id="1">Category description</language></description>
    <link_rewrite><language id="1">new-category</language></link_rewrite>
  </category>
</prestashop>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<prestashop xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">
  <customer_message>
    <id_customer_thread>1</id_customer_thread>
    <id_employee>0</id_employee>
    <message>Hello, I have a question about my order.</message>
    <private>0</private>
    <read>0</read>
  </customer_message>
</prestashop>

item.name: GET Tax Rule Group by ID

body.raw:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<prestashop xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">
  <carrier>
    <name>New Carrier</name>
    <active>1</active>
    <is_free>0</is_free>
    <shipping_handling>1</shipping_handling>
    <shipping_method>0</shipping_method>
    <range_behavior>0</range_behavior>
    <max_width>0</max_width>
    <max_height>0</max_height>
    <max_depth>0</max_depth>
    <max_weight>0</max_weight>
    <grade>0</grade>
    <delay><language id="1">2-3 business days</language></delay>
  </carrier>
</prestashop>
